children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this chapter, the assets, liabilities (including contingent liabilities arising from suits continued with a substitution or addition of parties under ), contracts, property, records, and unexpended balance of appropriations, authorizations, allocations, and other funds employed, held, used, arising from, available to, or to be made available in connection with the functions and offices, or portions thereof, transferred by any subchapter of this chapter shall be transferred to the Secretary for appropriate allocation.section 6615(e) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on use of transferred funds
children.label: b Limitation on use of transferred funds
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (c), unexpended and unobligated funds transferred pursuant to any subchapter of this chapter shall be used only for the purposes for which the funds were originally authorized and appropriated.

children.heading: Congressional notification
children.label: 1 Congressional notification
children.text: Funds transferred pursuant to subsection (a) may be available for the purposes of reorganization subject to notification of the appropriate congressional committees in accordance with the procedures applicable to a reprogramming of funds under .section 2706 of this title

children.heading: Transfer authority
children.label: 2 Transfer authority
children.text: Funds in any account appropriated to the Department of State may be transferred to another such account for the purposes of reorganization, subject to notification of the appropriate congressional committees in accordance with the procedures applicable to a reprogramming of funds under . The authority in this paragraph is in addition to any other transfer authority available to the Secretary of State and shall expire .section 2706 of this titleSeptember 30, 2000
